situation: SZ-BG-L-005 (low): uploadImage retry chain (original → compress-2500-q0.8 → compress-1500-q0.7) throws final error with only last result.data.message, losing how many compression stages were attempted. Debuggers cannot distinguish 'failed on original' from 'failed after all 3 compression fallbacks'.
action: Added stages[] tracker initialized to ['original']; each compression fallback pushes its label before attempting tryUpload. Final error message now reads `图片上传失败 (original → compress-2500-q0.8 → compress-1500-q0.7): <detail>` so callers see the full retry path.
outcome_evidence: git commit 37a1ff8 on auto/opt-background-1783213292; pushed to origin; diff +7/-1 lines adding stages array and updating throw message at line 92-94.
